title: sarothamnus arboreus var. malacitanus
intro: Sarothamnus arboreus var. malacitanus, also known as Rock Rose, is a variety of the Sarothamnus arboreus plant, a flowering shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It is rich in sesquiterpene lactones, particularly carnosic acid, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Rock Rose can be prepared in herbal tea, tincture, or oil form for topical application, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies.
